_docs.chit_chat_patterns: Exact normalized short user messages that should receive no Live Brain context. Use for greetings/acks only, not task words.
_docs.low_signal_words: Generic words ignored while deciding whether an episode adds signal. Do not put tool names, filenames, or concrete error codes here.
_docs.section_limits: Maximum injected rows per context section. Keep small so weak LLMs get deterministic, high-signal context.
_docs.auto_surface_pending_approvals: When true, pending self-evolution approvals are injected into the next turn even if the user did not ask for approvals.
